creator: guillaume-freebsd@outters.eu
text:
Would it help to compare boot log of a 14.1-RELEASE and a 14.2-release?

I have the exact same problem here, with two different AP, on an Inspiron 3535 I wanted to make my first FreeBSD-only home computer; as I started from scratch I had the "opportunity" to give up on 14.2 and go with 14.1 (with compat.linuxkpi.skb.mem_limit=1), as I'm in a hurry (no laptop, using my wife's and daughter's PCs when they hand it over), but maybe I can still run the 14.2 mem-stick installer and look for any divergence from the 14.1 boot log?
